Good in thread and concurrency in .net good in Azure concepts Candidate has Good knowledge QUESTION 1 You are working on an Order Processing API

. When a new order is created: A record is inserted into the Orders table A record is inserted into the OrderLogs table Your code looks like this: context.Orders.Add(order); context.OrderLogs.Add(log); context.SaveChanges(); What happens in this situationfi OUT OF 5

Will the first insert remain in the databasefi Or will both inserts be rolled backfi Whyfi FEEDBACK Knows it well Candidate has Basic knowledge QUESTION 2 would there be any (Lock) Performance Issue under below Scenario: where To fix race condition, someone added: private static object _lock = new object(); public void Increment() { lock(_lock) { Counter++; } } Under heavy load, performance dropped significantly. Questions: Why does performance degradefi What is lock contentionfi What alternative would you suggestfi Would ConcurrentDictionary help herefi When should you avoid lockfi FEEDBACK Knows about locks and the challenges with the current code knows about the threads will wait here due to this lock if there are multiple (say 100 request) Knows about ConcurrentDictionary and its use case Not aware with Interlocked

Candidate has No knowledge QUESTION 3 A request passes through multiple middlewares (auth, validation, logging). One middleware throws an error. How does it is decided which middleware runs nextfi FEEDBACK Not aware with Error middleware and how it works Candidate has Basic knowledge QUESTION 4 Scenario: You want to track audit fields like CreatedBy, CreatedDate automatically f or all entities. How will you do thatfi FEEDBACK Knows about it Candidate has Good knowledge QUESTION 5 Your .NET API allows multiple users to update the same resource. Sometimes one u ser overwrites another's changes. How can you prevent thisfi If User A and User B both load the same customer record: User A changes Name → "John" and saves. User B changes Email → "john@email.com" and saves

. User B changes Email → "john@email.com" and saves. Without concurrency control, User B’s save will overwrite User A’s Name change (be cause the whole row is updated). FEEDBACK Knows about how to handle it using RowVerssion optimistic consurrency Software Engineering 3 Performance Meets Expectations OVERALL FEEDBACK Good in SQL Inding concepts and queries good query writing skills Average in Azure concepts OUT OF 5

How do you design indexes without hurting write performancefi FEEDBACK Knows it well Candidate has Good knowledge QUESTION 3 A user’s role changes, but existing JWTs are still valid

. How would you handle this scenariofi FEEDBACK Select s.customer_id, Count(s.visit_id) As count_no_trans From Visits s Left Join Transactions t On s.visit_id = t.visit_id Where t.transaction_id is null Group by s.customer_id 1 2 3 4 5 6 7
